objective: Save the user's selected theme to localStorage when a theme is selected with the theme switcher/slider. On subsequent visits with JavaScript enabled, restore the saved theme (including system/default when index 0).

completed_stages.summary: Bootstrapped manifest; objective is actionable; handed off to Planner.
Plan and acceptance criteria for localStorage theme index persistence and client restore.
Implemented theme storage helpers, layout restore/persist, unit tests; check and unit tests pass.
Test report with AC coverage map and uncovered layout/E2E items.
PASS_WITH_NOTES: unit coverage strong; integration/e2e for reload optional follow-up.
